game_info.core_gameplay:
The core gameplay of this game can be summarized as: "multi-segment snake elimination" + "vampire survivor-style roguelike mowing."

Combat Controls: Players control a character at the bottom to move left and right (or move freely), and the character automatically shoots upwards.

Core Mechanism (God Worm Mechanism): The enemy is an extremely long "god worm" composed of countless circular nodes (similar to a snake). Player attacks do not deduct from the total health bar, but rather destroy the worm's body segment by segment.

In-game Progression (Roguelike): Destroying worm nodes drops experience points/coins/treasure chests.

Upgrading brings up a "choose one of three" skill interface (as shown in the video: Burst Bow, Poison Blade, Void Sword).

Skills have synergies and evolution chains (e.g., a normal flying sword evolves into a full-screen giant sword, or triggers a lotus magic circle).
game_info.core_usp:
The therapeutic feeling of "pruning" (ASMR): Watching a worm, hundreds of segments long and densely packed, break and shorten segment by segment under your own firepower, like tearing paper or mowing grass. This utilizes the human "desire for destruction" and the "soothing feeling of obsessive-compulsive disorder."

The exhilarating contrast of godlike skills: Starting with a timid bow and arrow, you instantly unleash a powerful attack after selecting "Void Sword" or "Lotus Array," a giant flying sword sweeping across the entire screen, creating a huge visual contrast.

The greedy satisfaction of loot dropping everywhere: Breaking certain segments will drop treasure chests and a large amount of gold coins, which are automatically absorbed by the character, accompanied by a crisp clinking sound, satisfying the player's collecting desires.
game_info.value_hooks:
Core Systems Design

Combat System: Players are positioned at the bottom of the screen, while the BOSS descends from above.

Hit Points: Each segment of the Divine Worm is an independent target, with its own health and damage.

Skills & Progression:
Basic Weapons: Bow and Arrow (single target, ricochet), Throwing Knife (poison), Throwing Sword (penetrating, high damage).

Advanced/Ultimate Skills:
Void Sword: Summons a giant flying sword that traverses the screen, slicing across a large area.

Lotus Field: Creates a rotating lotus in the center of the screen, dealing continuous multi-hit damage to any segments it touches.

Attribute Buffs: Damage bonus, attack speed bonus, suction range.

Level & Enemies:
Monster Form: Snake form. Its length increases with level, moving in an S-shape and spiral, creating a sense of encirclement and pressure for the player.

Mechanism: Some sections have special markers (such as treasure chests or shields), and breaking them will trigger special rewards.
